---
name: Good first issue
about: Small, well-scoped contribution for Palisade
title: "[good first issue] "
labels: good first issue
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

Describe the small user-visible or test-visible improvement.

## Scope

- Keep changes focused.
- Add or update tests where behavior changes.
- Update docs if the command or policy surface changes.

## Pointers

- Start with `pnpm install`, `pnpm build`, and `pnpm test`.
- Run `pnpm eval` if detector, taint, or policy behavior changes.
